name: Can I get comp for stress/mental health from toxic work in Ogden?
description: Unlikely without physical injury; prove work causation.[1]

mainEntity.name: Can I get comp for stress/mental health from toxic work in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Unlikely without physical injury; prove work causation.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Rarely; Utah requires physical injury first or extreme conditions; mental-only claims hard.[1] Occupational illnesses covered if proven.[1] Key factors: Doctor diagnosis tied to work; no pre-existing. Practical guidance: Document incidents; psych eval. Consult attorney—success low without physical.[2] Focus on provable links.[1]
